eas_text: A civil authority has issued A 911 TELEPHONE OUTAGE EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Williams, OH; at 2:41 PM on JUN 6, 2026 Effective until 5:41 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Williams County is experiencing a 911 outage due to a local telephone provider issue. If you cannot reach emergency services by dialing 911, use the alternate number, 419-633-5115, instead. Please call the alternate number only if you have an emergency. Text-to-911 also remains available. This outage may also impact local non-emergency lines. If you have a police, fire, or medical emergency and cannot reach 911, call 419-633-5115 or send a text message to 911 to reach Williams County Central Communications. Please use the alternate number only for genuine emergencies so the lines stay open for those who need help. Updated information will be released when 911 service is restored.
